data.body: AC amendment: Before writing examples and error messages into the doc, verify that sibling stories (3f65-65ee, 983e-7fff) are complete and their implementation is merged. Quote actual error message strings directly from ticket-graph.py's resolve_hierarchy_link() return values and add_dependency() error paths — do not fabricate example output. If actual error messages are not yet available (implementation not merged), use placeholder strings marked with TODO and note that they must be updated post-implementation.
